heading: Definitions
label: 6202 Definitions
notes: Amendments1993—Par. (6). substituted “citrus latifolia” for “citrus aurantifolia”.Pub. L. 103–194
amendments: Amendments1993—Par. (6). substituted “citrus latifolia” for “citrus aurantifolia”.Pub. L. 103–194

children.heading: Board
children.label: 1 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the Lime Board provided for under .section 6204(b) of this title

children.heading: Consumer information
children.label: 2 Consumer information
children.text: The term “consumer information” means any action taken to provide information to, and broaden the understanding of, the general public regarding the use, nutritional attributes, and care of limes.

children.heading: Handle
children.label: 3 Handle
children.text: The term “handle” means to sell, purchase, or package limes.

children.heading: Handler
children.label: 4 Handler
children.text: The term “handler” means any person in the business of handling limes.

children.heading: Importer
children.label: 5 Importer
children.text: The term “importer” means any person who imports limes into the United States.

children.heading: Lime
children.label: 6 Lime
children.text: The term “lime” means the fruit of a citrus latifolia tree for the fresh market.

children.heading: Marketing
children.label: 7 Marketing
children.text: The term “marketing” means the sale or other disposition of limes in commerce.

children.heading: Order
children.label: 8 Order
children.text: The term “order” means a lime research, promotion, and consumer information order issued by the Secretary under .section 6203(a) of this title

children.heading: Person
children.label: 9 Person
children.text: The term “person” means any individual, group of individuals, partnership, corporation, association, cooperative, or other legal entity.

children.heading: Producer
children.label: 10 Producer
children.text: The term “producer” means any person who produces limes in the United States for sale in commerce.

children.heading: Producer-handler
children.label: 11 Producer-handler
children.text: The term “producer-handler” means any person who is both a producer and handler of limes.

children.heading: Promotion
children.label: 12 Promotion
children.text: The term “promotion” means any action taken under this chapter (including paid advertising) to present a favorable image for limes to the general public with the express intent of improving the competitive position and stimulating the sale of limes.

children.heading: Research
children.label: 13 Research
children.text: The term “research” means any type of research relating to the use and nutritional value of limes and designed to advance the image, desirability, marketability, or quality of limes.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 14 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.label: A
children.text: “State” means each of the 50 States of the United States, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico; and

children.label: B
children.text: “United States” means the 50 States of the United States, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.
